creator: rwatson@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended


Fixes for this problem are under-way: support for the strong ES model 
check interface is being implemented.  A short-term solution involves 
the newly introduced net.inet.ip.check_interface which forces the IP 
stack to accept packets only on addresses appropriate for the interface. 
Use of this flag is recommended on firewalls, and documentation should 
be updated to reflect that. 

I'm going to move the PR to suspended, but report back on it as strong 
ES becomes available.
